candidate.name: Andre Bryce
candidate.cvText:
Andre Bryce
Austin, TX
Senior SDR / SDR Lead at HubSpot. 4 years outbound + team lead.

SDR Lead · HubSpot · Austin, TX
- Lead a pod of 8 SDRs covering Mid-Market North America; quota 40 SQLs/month/rep
- Built outbound sequences in Salesloft, refined cold-call scripts, ran call-coaching
- 142% team quota attainment FY24; promoted from individual SDR after 18 months
- Pipeline generation, prospecting, cadence design, outreach, cold calling
- Tools: Salesloft, ZoomInfo, Apollo, Gong, Salesforce, HubSpot

SDR · HubSpot · Austin, TX
- 158% personal quota attainment as IC SDR
- Demos booked, meetings booked, lead qualification, sequences, prospecting
- BDR / SDR funnel ownership, MQL → SQL conversion
knownIssues: cv-pulse rubric mismatch (upstream): rolepulse-jobs sends role_type='sales' to cv-pulse; cv-pulse roleHint isn't in ALL_ROLES so defaults to 'AE'. CV is SDR-shaped: detectRole should return 'SDR' from CV keywords (outbound, prospecting, sequences, cadence, sdr, bdr) — but if hits < MIN_HITS_TO_DETECT (3), it falls back to AE rubric, inflating AE-aligned JD scores.

Matcher bug B3 (this repo): SDR Lead candidates applying to 'Senior SDR Lead' titles get penalised because juniorRole regex matches 'sdr' in the title. Combined with leadership seniority on the CV, this stacks a -35 penalty for what should be a same-role-same-level Strong fit.

Matcher gap B1 (this repo): Within-family role-type mismatch (SDR Lead → IC AE / Inside Sales Director) gets no penalty because both sides classify as 'sales' family. ae-senior + inside-sales-director Strong-band scores below are matcher artefacts, not endorsements.

jobs.title: Senior SDR Lead, Mid-Market
jobs.note: B3: SDR Lead → Senior SDR Lead penalised by juniorRole regex matching 'sdr'. SHOULD be Strong; matcher returns Good (66) due to bug.

jobs.title: Business Development Representative
jobs.note: Lead-of-juniors → IC BDR is a step back; Good is reasonable.

jobs.title: Senior Account Executive II
jobs.note: B1: SDR Lead → senior IC AE within-family role-type mismatch undercounted. SHOULD be Partial/Good; matcher returns Strong (84).

jobs.title: Inside Sales Director
jobs.note: B1+B2: SDR Lead (manager seniority) → Director step-up not penalised (manager → leadership has no penalty branch). SHOULD be Partial; matcher returns Strong (88).

jobs.title: Senior Solutions Engineer (Pre-Sales)
jobs.note: Cross-family (presales) — family penalty caps at 55. Working as intended.

jobs.title: Account Executive — EMEA
jobs.note: Same family but cross-region (UK) onsite — location floor cap. Working as intended.
